summary: Mixed recording with a messy start to set 2, but the show delivers strong energy and an excellent Stella Blue.
review: The performance is marked by desire, juice, and several hot stretches that make it worth listening despite vocal lapses and a chaotic beginning of the second set. Reviewers note that the Ultra‑Jamboree (UJB) mix sounds poor at the start, yet they highlight an outstanding rendition of "Stella Blue." Overall the show is enjoyable, though the recording quality varies throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Review rates the show 4 stars, praising overall energy and a standout "Stella Blue" while noting recording flaws; combined weighting yields an above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Beginning of set 2 described as a mess (UJB not good) and vocal lapses throughout; overall decent but inconsistent clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Start of second set is messy, but the concert maintains strong desire and juice, delivering hot stretches that keep it worthwhile.
